zh.St Nicholas Churchyard, Henstridge, Sout: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特韓絲翠
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Stourton於1374年出生在英國時，她的父親William Stourton3歲，母親Elizabeth Moigne2歲。她於1404年與William Clarent在英國英格蘭多瑟特結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1463年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特享年89歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特韓絲翠。

zh-hans.St Nicholas Churchyard, Henstridge, Sout: 英国英格兰薩默塞特韓絲翠
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Stourton于1374年出生在英国时，她的父亲William Stourton3岁，母亲Elizabeth Moigne2岁。她于1404年与William Clarent在英国英格兰多瑟特结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1463年在英国英格兰薩默塞特享年89岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特韓絲翠。

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Stourton was born in 1374, in England, her father, William Stourton, was 3 and her mother, Elizabeth Moigne, was 2. She married William Clarent in 1404, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1463, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 89, and was buried in Henstridge, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Stourton est née en 1374, à Angleterre, son père, William Stourton, avait 3 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Moigne, avait 2 ans. Elle a épousé William Clarent en 1404, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1463, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Henstridge, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Stourton 1374 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Stourton 3 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Moigne 2. Sie hat 1404 in Dorset, England, United Kingdom William Clarent geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1463 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Henstridge, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Stourton è nata il nel 1374 nel England, sua padre, William Stourton, aveva 3 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Moigne, aveva 2 anni. Lei sposato William Clarent nel 1404, nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1463, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolta a Henstridge, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Stourtonが1374年にイギリスで生まれた時，父William Stourtonは3歳，母Elizabeth Moigneは2歳であった。1404年にイギリスイギリスドールセトでWilliam Clarentと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1463年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで89歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトヘンストリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Stourton(이)가 1374년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Stourton(은)는 3세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Moigne(은)는 2세였다. 그녀는 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 William Clarent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1463년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 헨스트리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Stourton nasceu em 1374, em Inglaterra, seu pai, William Stourton, tinha 3 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Moigne, tinha 2 anos. Ela casou-se com William Clarent em 1404, em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1463, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Henstridge, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Stourton родилась в 1374 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени William Stourton было 3 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Moigne, 2. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Clarent в 1404 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1463 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности хенстридж, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Stourton nació en 1374, en Inglaterra, su papá, William Stourton, tenía 3 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Moigne, tenía 2 años. Se casó con William Clarent en 1404, en Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1463, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Henstridge, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
